title: Add model search bar to dashboard
author: tomdacatto
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Adds a search input to the Models section (dashboard) that filters by name, display name, description, and brand
- Tabs stay pinned to the full catalog — a search query filters contents only, never hides or auto-switches a tab
- Shows a "no results" state when a filter matches nothing

## Notes
Split out of #12157 so this frontend-only change (no backend/Tinybird changes) can merge independently of the generation-throughput discussion.

## Test plan
- [x] `tsc --noEmit` clean
- [x] Verified live in browser (search filters, tab pinning, no-results state)

gist.headline: Search the hive
gist.blurb: Added a shiny new search bar to the dashboard's Models section. Now you can filter the ever-growing catalog by name, brand, or description without losing your place.
gist.summary: Added a search input to the dashboard's Models section that filters the catalog by name, display name, description, and brand while keeping tabs pinned.
gist.impact: Users can now instantly find specific models across the catalog without manually scrolling through tabs.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot using a magnifying glass to look at a catalog or list of models (represented as glowing blocks or files). The robot companion could be holding the list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot hovering with a tiny magnifying glass, inspecting a glowing list of digital files held by a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
